data_description.enable_notifications: Receive doorbell ring and missed call events from the intercom

user.title: Comelit Man
user.description: Connect to your Comelit 6701W intercom locally.

data_description.name: Friendly name for this intercom (leave empty to use the host IP)
data_description.host: IP address of your Comelit device
data_description.port: TCP port for ICONA Bridge protocol (default: 64100)
data_description.http_port: HTTP port for device web interface (default: 8080)
data_description.token: Leave empty to auto-extract from device using password
data_description.password: Only needed if token is not provided

dhcp_confirm.title: Comelit device found
dhcp_confirm.description: A Comelit device was discovered at {host}. Enter credentials to complete setup.

data_description.token: Leave empty to auto-extract using the device password
data_description.password: Only needed if token is not provided

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Comelit Man
reauth_confirm.description: Authentication failed. Enter a new token or password to reconnect.

data_description.token: Leave empty to auto-extract from device using password
data_description.password: Only needed if token is not provided

data_description.host: IP address of your Comelit device
data_description.port: TCP port for ICONA Bridge protocol (default: 64100)
data_description.http_port: HTTP port for device web interface (default: 8080)
data_description.token: Leave empty to auto-extract from device using password
data_description.password: Only needed if token is not provided

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the device
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed — check token or password
error.token_extraction_failed: Could not extract token from device backup

abort.another_device: This IP address belongs to a different device that is already configured.

video_rtpc_not_received.message: Video channel not established — device did not respond

auth_failed.title: Authentication failed
auth_failed.description: Comelit Man cannot connect to {name} — the token is invalid or expired. Go to Settings → Integrations → Comelit Man and choose Re-authenticate.
